nasb.text: But Uriah slept at the door of the king’s house with all the servants of his lord, and did not go down to his house.

esv.text: But Uriah slept at the door of the king’s house with all the servants of his lord, and did not go down to his house.

cnv.text: 烏利亞卻和他主人的臣僕一同睡在王宮門外，沒有回到自己家裡去。

ccb.text: 但他跟王的其他仆人一同睡在王宫门口，没有回家。
